plugins.name: zyx
plugins.description: Unified Claude Code plugin: zyx skills (procedures + domain knowledge), the worker-agent fleet, and the utils MCP toolbox (bundled via .mcp.json, ADR-0004), one namespace. Engine retired in 0.3.0 (ADR-0003).
